description_long: This bungalow features a light-colored exterior with horizontal siding and a stone foundation, complemented by a covered front porch with steps leading up from a straight walkway. The roof is a combination of gable and dormer elements, with two prominent dormers facing the front and a partially open rooftop terrace at the rear. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, while the back includes a pergola-covered patio area with outdoor seating. A mature tree and paved walkway are present in the front yard, and a second tree is visible on the side. The structure appears to be a single-family home with both indoor and outdoor living spaces, including balconies and porches.
description: A light-colored bungalow with a gabled roof, dormers, covered front porch, rooftop terrace, and pergola-covered rear patio, surrounded by trees and walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entrance, symmetrical dormers, and a tree with a straight walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side windows, stone foundation, and a tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, pergola-covered patio with outdoor seating, and large rear windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional windows, the side entrance area, and a tree with a paved path.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
